title: centella stenophylla
intro: Centella stenophylla, also known as Indian pennywort or Gotu Kola, is a plant species that belongs to the Centella genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centella stenophylla include improved cognitive function, enhanced wound healing, and reduced stress and anxiety. Centella stenophylla can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine.
